hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "UserPromptSubmit", "additionalContext": "WAJIB sebelum mengerjakan: (1) Baca CLAUDE.md dengan Read tool, (2) Query graphify graph dengan: python -c \"import json; from graphify.build import build_from_json; from pathlib import Path; G = build_from_json(json.loads(Path(\\\"graphify-out/graph.json\\\").read_text())); print(G.number_of_nodes(), \\\"nodes loaded\\\")\" — lalu gunakan /graphify query untuk cari konteks relevan."}}'
